title: Reserve final release metadata archive budget
outOfScope: publishing, tagging, or provider release operations

sources.reason: Current archive-growth ceiling and repayment records.
Predecessor closure evidence and current archive boundary.
Release sequencing and complete lifecycle requirement.

riskAssessment.reason: Policy-only reservation of the measured next immutable archive record.

executionDecision.reason: User-authorized process correction; reserve exactly one measured archive record.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record checkpoints before editing and finishing.

acceptance: The budget gate supports a bounded future reservation in addition to the current Work Item archive reservation.
The current Work Item reserves archiveGrowth 496 and the explicitly named final metadata Work Item reserves the next 497 record under one bounded policy window.
The full Finish Gate, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and default-base synchronization evidence is recorded.
guidelines: Reserve measured process-change line growth and the current archive record, plus the explicitly named successor record under one bounded window ending at archiveGrowth 497.
Do not rewrite immutable archive evidence or generate release metadata in this Work Item.

intent.problem: The final release metadata Work Item will add one immutable archive record, while the current governance archive-growth ceiling is 495.
constraints: This is the template repository, not an adopter runtime.
Do not start the final metadata Work Item until this reservation is merged and closed.
Do not publish or tag a release in this Work Item.
intent.rationale: Make the budget reservation an explicit, independently reviewable Work Item so the final release cannot bypass the preflight ceiling.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized root-cause workflow correction before release.

rollbackNote: Revert the policy reservation and its generated lifecycle evidence; do not alter prior immutable archives.

reservationWindow.reason: The final metadata Work Item is the explicitly identified immediate successor; this Work Item also reserves its own measured process-change line growth.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: next archive record fits reserved ceiling
release metadata remains out of scope

rawUserRequest: 预算不足必须在事前检查中拦截；按完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程继续发布，不绕过任何工单。

declaredIntent.summary: Reserve the exact archive-growth budget needed by the final release metadata Work Item.
